# BP-93 positive variant: multiple return values are both discarded
lang: go
file: BP-93-variant-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"

func run() error {
	var g errgroup.Group
	g.Go(func() error {
		_, _ = doWork()
		return nil
	})
	return g.Wait()
}

func doWork() (int, error) { return 0, nil }
